title: Earthy Mushroom Noodle Stir Fry
description: A French-inspired stir fry made with earthy mushrooms, noodles, and a hint of Chinese flavors. Perfect as a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: French noodles
ingredients.notes: Rice noodles or udon work well

instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the flavorful oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Chinese five-spice and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
Drizzle with soy sauce and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped scallions or sesame seeds, if desired.
